content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw)
C: min_fix ∧ skew30 ∧ preserve(next(err))
P: normalize_ms ∧ cmp("<=") ∧ grace(skew30) ∧ single_site
V: boundary_exact ∧ just_over_skew30 ∧ refresh_loop_gone ∧ "401" ∧ unit_test
A: patch(expiry_cmp) ∧ reg_test(skew30_boundary)

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth middleware).
Constraints: minimal fix and 30-second grace window and preserve(next(err)).
Plan: normalize_ms and cmp("<=") and grace(30-second grace window) and single_site.
Verify: boundary_exact and just_over_skew30 and refresh_loop_gone and "401" and unit_test.
Answer target: patch(expiry_cmp) and regression test(skew30_boundary).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: decide(arch)
C: team("6") ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest)
P: default(modular_monolith) ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ seam(billing|core_app) ∧ split(post_release)
V: ship_on_time ∧ low_ops_cost ∧ split_ready
A: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ why(small_team ∧ short_ddl ∧ defer_distribution)

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(arch).
Constraints: team("6") and deadline("4 months") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest).
Plan: default(modular_monolith) and store("PostgreSQL") and seam(billing or core_app) and split(post_release).
Verify: ship_on_time and low_ops_cost and split_ready.
Answer target: modular_monolith and "PostgreSQL" and why(small_team and short_ddl and defer_distribution).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: review("x-user-id")
C: public_boundary ∧ session_auth
P: drop_header ∧ use(session.userId) ∧ return("401")
V: test(spoof_header) ∧ test(missing_session) ∧ test(cross_user_denial)
A: risk(impersonation) ∧ mitigation(bind_session) ∧ verify(boundary_tests)

[AUDIT]
Goal: review("x-user-id").
Constraints: public_boundary and session_auth.
Plan: drop_header and use(session.userId) and return("401").
Verify: test(spoof_header) and test(missing_session) and test(cross_user_denial).
Answer target: risk(impersonation) and mitigation(bind_session) and verify(boundary_tests).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: preserve_order ∧ minimal_change ∧ single_error_map
P: validate("missing_id") → "await" ∧ db.findUser → branch("not_found") → audit.log → cache.set → respond
V: test(success) ∧ test("missing_id") ∧ test(db_err→"next(err)") ∧ test(not_found) ∧ no_double_callback
A: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ keep("next(err)") ∧ no_sig_change

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: preserve execution order and minimal_change and single_error_map.
Plan: validate("missing_id") then "await" and db.findUser then branch("not_found") then audit.log then cache.set then respond.
Verify: test(success) and test("missing_id") and test(db_err then "next(err)") and test(not_found) and no_double_callback.
Answer target: "async" and "await" and keep("next(err)") and no_sig_change.
